Package com.bonitasoft.engine.bpm.delegation

package com.bonitasoft.engine.bpm.delegation
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.bonitasoft.engine.bpm.delegation.impl
     
  • Class
    Description
    DelegatedTask
    Read-only view of a HumanTaskInstance that the current user is allowed to act on through an active DelegationRule.
    DelegatedTaskSearchDescriptor
    Search descriptor keys for DelegationAPI.searchDelegatedTasks(org.bonitasoft.engine.search.SearchOptions).
    DelegationRule
    Task delegation rule defined by a user (the delegator) granting another user (the delegate) visibility and execution rights on the delegator's human tasks during a bounded delegation period.
    DelegationRuleCreator
    Helper for creating or upserting a DelegationRule through DelegationAPI.createOrUpdateDelegation(DelegationRuleCreator).
    DelegationRuleCreator.Field
    Settable fields on the creator.
    DelegationRuleSearchDescriptor
    Search descriptor keys for DelegationAPI.searchDelegationRules(org.bonitasoft.engine.search.SearchOptions).
    DelegationRuleUpdater
    Helper for partially updating a DelegationRule through DelegationAPI.updateDelegation(long, DelegationRuleUpdater).
    DelegationRuleUpdater.Field
    Updatable fields on the rule.
    DelegationStatus
    Lifecycle status of a DelegationRule, derived at query time from the rule's startDate / endDate compared against the current timestamp.
